validation_command: python -c "import pathlib; s=pathlib.Path('Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/schema.sql').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); checks={'ck_athletes_deleted_reason':'ck_athletes_deleted_reason' in s,'ck_athletes_shirt_number':'ck_athletes_shirt_number' in s,'ck_attendance_status':'ck_attendance_status' in s,'ck_attendance_source':'ck_attendance_source' in s,'ck_categories_max_age_positive':'ck_categories_max_age_positive' in s,'ck_match_events_score_our':'ck_match_events_score_our' in s,'ck_attendance_correction_fields':'ck_attendance_correction_fields' in s}; fails=[k for k,v in checks.items() if not v]; [print(f'FAIL: CHECK constraint ausente: {f}') for f in fails]; exit(len(fails)) if fails else print(f'PASS AR_056: {len(checks)} CHECK constraints de consistência verificados em schema.sql')"
